name: Grade 5 Language Arts — Semester 2
description: An 18-week Grade 5 pathway for synthesis, revision, speaking, listening, and purposeful publication. Learning advances through inquiry, practice, authentic application, revision, and communication.
learningGoals: Develop grade 5 knowledge and transferable skills in synthesis, revision, speaking, listening, and purposeful publication.
Use appropriate evidence, vocabulary, tools, and methods to explain reasoning.
Plan, revise, collaborate responsibly, and communicate a well-supported conclusion.
